# Aadit Technologies

> Aadit Technologies is a cybersecurity, compliance, and IT managed-services
> provider based in Bengaluru, India. We help startups through enterprise
> organisations — especially in healthcare, BFSI, fintech, e-commerce, and SaaS —
> secure their systems, achieve and maintain compliance certifications, and run
> reliable IT operations.

## Core service areas

- [Cybersecurity](https://aadit.net/cybersecurity): Managed SOC, VAPT (vulnerability assessment & penetration testing), endpoint and network security, security architecture review, and incident response.
- [Compliance & Audits](https://aadit.net/compliance): Certification and audit readiness for ISO 27001, SOC 2, HIPAA, PCI DSS, GDPR, and India's DPDP Act.
- [IT Managed Services](https://aadit.net/it-managed-services): 24/7 infrastructure monitoring, cloud operations, help desk, backup, and disaster recovery.

## Industries

- [Startups & Scaleups](https://aadit.net/industries/startups): Right-sized security and SOC 2 / ISO 27001 to close enterprise deals and pass due diligence.
- [Healthcare & BFSI](https://aadit.net/industries/healthcare-bfsi): HIPAA, RBI cybersecurity guidelines, PCI DSS, and ISO 27001 with continuous monitoring.
- [E-commerce & Fintech](https://aadit.net/industries/ecommerce-fintech): PCI DSS, GDPR/DPDP, fraud prevention, and application/API security testing.

## Learn

- [Security & Compliance Glossary](https://aadit.net/glossary): Plain-English definitions of VAPT, SOC, SIEM, ISO 27001, GDPR, HIPAA, PCI DSS, and SOC 2.
- [Insights & Blog](https://aadit.net/blog): Practical guidance on cybersecurity, compliance, and managed IT.

- [Homepage](https://aadit.net/)
